prompt: Assess how far along the work is, the percent complete, any defects, and the remaining work.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Panelboard installation & makeup, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: no panel schedule. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NEC Art. 408, 110.26 (working clearance), 200.4. Treat this as roughly 70 percent complete until defects are corrected.
title: Progress assessment: Panelboard installation & makeup (commercial project)
